
/*//

## compile into header file
C:\Users\ct770\Downloads\CODENAME_MEXP\rxdk\RXDK\xbox\bin\xsasm.exe /h "C:\Users\ct770\Downloads\CODENAME_MEXP\vs26 xbox test\Original Xbox Game1\SRC\External\HLSL\fontPS.txt"

*///

xps.1.1  ; Xbox pixel shader version 1.1.



tex t0 

; move texture into alpha channel
mov r0, t0.b 

; move color into RGB channel
mov r0.rgb, v0
